license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8hght3w
title: RNA extraction from  Pichia pastoris
author: Igem Dusseldorf

steps_raw.instruction: pipeting hole culture of Pichia liquid culture into 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tubes
centrifugation for 1 min at 10.000 x g
extract RNA with Kit: for e.g. ZymoResearch YeaStar RNA Kit (Cat.#R1002) following the manufacturers manual.
messure the concentration a A260/280 ratio of ~2.0 indicates pure RNA
To remove DNA contamination, treated samples with DNase use also a Clean and Concentrator Kit for e.g. the Zymoclean RNA Clean & Concentrator Kit (Cat.# R1013).
